testcase.name: Verify the Discover feature › Verify the category feature
Verify the Discover feature › Verify the search feature
testcase.system-out: [INFO][03-31-2026 15:33:42]: searching movie name:The Great Texas Dynamite Chase

testcase.name: Verify the Discover feature › Verify the combination of category, search, filter feature
Verify the Discover feature › Verify the pagination feature
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › scripts/discover.spec.ts:88:9 › Verify the Discover feature › Verify the pagination feature
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
Locator: locator('//*[contains(@class,\'overflow-scroll\')]/div/div') Expected: 20 Received: 0 Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('//*[contains(@class,\'overflow-scroll\')]/div/div') 9 × locator resolved to 0 elements - unexpected value "0"
at pages/discoverpage.ts:105
103 | 104 | public async verifyTheNumberOfMoviesReturned(numberOfReturn: number) { > 105 | await expect(this.page.locator(this.div_resultSection)).toHaveCount(numberOfReturn); | ^ 106 | } 107 | 108 | public async verifyTheNameOfMoviesReturned(nameOfMovies: string) { at DiscoverPage.verifyTheNumberOfMoviesReturned (/Users/huynh.hoan/interview/tests/pages/discoverpage.ts:105:65) at /Users/huynh.hoan/interview/tests/scripts/discover.spec.ts:99:28

attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/scripts-discover-Verify-th-adb49-rify-the-pagination-feature-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Verify the Discover feature › Verify that after refreshing the page should see page not found
Verify the Discover feature › Verify that after redirecting the page directly by URL should see page not found
Verify the Discover feature › Verify that user should see the No Results found message when searching with invalid data
Verify the Discover feature › Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly

failure.message: discover.spec.ts:121:9 Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › scripts/discover.spec.ts:121:9 › Verify the Discover feature › Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly
Error: expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality
Expected: "2025-12-31" Received: "2026-12-31"
at pages/discoverpage.ts:133
131 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("sort_by")).toEqual(params.sort_by); 132 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("release_date.gte")).toEqual(params['release_date.gte']); > 133 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("release_date.lte")).toEqual(params['release_date.lte']); | ^ 134 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("vote_average.gte")).toEqual(params['vote_average.gte']); 135 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("vote_average.lte")).toEqual(params['vote_average.lte']); 136 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("page")).toEqual(params.page); at DiscoverPage.verifyTheParams (/Users/huynh.hoan/interview/tests/pages/discoverpage.ts:133:63) at /Users/huynh.hoan/interview/tests/scripts/discover.spec.ts:170:28
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/scripts-discover-Verify-th-61bac--reponse-returned-correctly-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.system-out:
[INFO][03-31-2026 15:34:35]: selecting category:Popular [INFO][03-31-2026 15:34:37]: Starting filter movie with the criteria: { "category": "Popular", "type": "TV Shows", "genre": [ "Animation", "Comedy" ], "yearFrom": "2025", "yearTo": "2025", "rating": 3 } [INFO][03-31-2026 15:34:39]: Verifying the below params: { "sort_by": "popularity.desc", "release_date.gte": "2025-01-01", "release_date.lte": "2025-12-31", "vote_average.gte": "3", "vote_average.lte": "5", "page": "1", "with_genres": "16,35", "api_key": "add494e96808c55b3ee7f940c9d5e5b6" } [INFO][03-31-2026 15:34:39]: Verifying the below response: { "page": 1, "results": [ { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/cyH8Ni1OSMtBbloEmI9eE69Xi7j.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 35, 16, 10765, 10751 ], "id": 47035, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Uncle Grandpa", "overview": "The adventures of Uncle Grandpa who is out to help every child and adult in the world through the power of imagination. With his mystical R.V. and eternal optimism, Uncle Grandpa is always ready to greet the day - and everyone he meets - with his signature, \"Good Mornin'.\"", "popularity": 32.1295, "poster_path": "/zLVOgigPMsd2hkwmcY5AqNhqgcn.jpg", "first_air_date": "2013-09-02", "name": "Uncle Grandpa", "vote_average": 4.478, "vote_count": 114 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/u28izLFeMVNQhe5cxdubcS7ztjB.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 10759, 10765, 35, 10751 ], "id": 243216, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "わんだふるぷりきゅあ！", "overview": "In Animal Town where humans and animals live together, Iroha who loves animals is very close to her dog Komugi! One day, a mysterious creature called a GaruGaru goes berserk in her city. In order to protect Iroha, Komugi transforms into a human and even a Pretty Cure…!? We have to protect such berserk animals! Let's join forces and return the animals to the Niko Garden!", "popularity": 17.3105, "poster_path": "/2PhiNPB0UyqBu9pHm0cluD0Sh3W.jpg", "first_air_date": "2024-02-04", "name": "Wonderful Precure!", "vote_average": 4, "vote_count": 7 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/dlOkqakV9AKFFUS6Sxn64VS5ffp.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35, 80, 9648 ], "id": 126725, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Velma", "overview": "Jinkies! This raucous reimagining of the Scooby-Doo franchise unravels the mysterious origins of Mystery, Inc. – as seen through the eyes of the gang’s beloved bespectacled detective Velma.", "popularity": 12.853, "poster_path": "/zxkNhuPSHeDv3yA7sFu2RuEOGgR.jpg", "first_air_date": "2023-01-12", "name": "Velma", "vote_average": 3.41, "vote_count": 332 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/hqYwmjCnzXwLlEk0O2psygJQYsi.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 279120, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "「１分間だけ触れてもいいよ…」シェアハウスの秘密ルール。", "overview": "After entering university, Ryota moves into a share house where he meets two stunningly beautiful sharemates, Momoka and Kanade. As the three of them begin to cohabitate together, they agree on one \"secret rule.\" \"If it's just for a minute, you can touch whatever you want.\" Thus begins Ryota's new life at the share house, where sweet temptation lies behind every door...!", "popularity": 14.1802, "poster_path": "/chmCJiUJqhOpBKfJi88Rw2iB8IT.jpg", "first_air_date": "2025-01-06", "name": "The Share House's Secret Rule", "/a1q4poXtZvd22sZhfiYFkhWetMx.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 9648, 35 ], "id": 87447, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "歌舞伎町シャーロック", "overview": "Shinjuku Ward, east side… The center of the street with the most chaos, there's Kabuki-chō, full of neon lights. When the light is stronger, the shadow is deeper. The story begins when certain bizarre murder happens one night! Suspense? Or Comedy? Drama that cannot be identified begins!", "popularity": 10.2942, "poster_path": "/a3IN3jazd0GtDjSPuPuf9WTqR56.jpg", "first_air_date": "2019-10-10", "name": "Case File N° 221: Kabukicho", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 20 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/sBOkXcbG6dIRlUp1UspwsdzGZsi.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 10751, 35 ], "id": 88069, "origin_country": [ "CA" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Total DramaRama", "overview": "Some of the original \"Total Drama\" characters enter into an alternate universe where they are aged down from teenagers to toddlers.", "popularity": 9.4401, "poster_path": "/A9KAegh5542L8JktkwsZZrdekhe.jpg", "first_air_date": "2018-09-01", "name": "Total DramaRama", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 30 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/la8Al5cs0gs2xkgE5WiLKEyOSTX.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 35 ], "id": 44997, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "エスパー魔美", "overview": "Mami Sakura used to be a normal junior high school student, but she happened to acquire supernatural powers. Using her powers and with the help of her childhood friend, Kazuo Takahata, she solves mysterious occurrences.\n\nShe then saves people in trouble with her psychic powers, such as telekinesis and telepathy. When she senses someone needs help, she uses the \"Teleportation Gun\" (a heart-shaped brooch Takahata designs) and transports herself there. Mami's teleportation is only triggered when a projectile is flying toward her, and this locket that shoots out tiny marbles is a portable gadget for teleporting in a controlled way, rather than by chance. Her telekinesis can be precise to a cellular level, which enables her to transport cancerous cells out of one of her father's art critics. Her telepathy allows her to access people's thoughts and dreams.", "popularity": 6.8932, "poster_path": "/eLApJavOyMAK1q1xLaQhnKk5PAA.jpg", "first_air_date": "1987-04-07", "name": "Mami the Psychic", "vote_average": 4.2, "vote_count": 4 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/tVsrQ1nu3k0Y5H999bcpTCnf9LT.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 46938, "origin_country": [ "RU" ], "original_language": "ru", "original_name": "Лунтик и его друзья", "overview": "\"The Adventures of Luntik\" or simply \"Luntik\" is a Russian animated series for children of preschool age. It is the story of a small fluffy creature, Luntik, who was born on the Moon and fell from it, on to the Earth. Luntik is the main character and each episode features a story about him and his friends. Luntik is new to the Earth and in each episode he learns something about this new world. He meets new friends, learns how to be polite and even gets a family. The majority of the characters in the series are small animals: insects, fish, frogs, bees, grasshoppers, ladybugs etc. The show features both adult and children characters. The series are shown from the child's perspective and the stories are very kind and warm. Even the \"villains\" of the series - two caterpillars - are just a couple of mischievous kids. Each episode is only 6 minutes long and has a finished story line.", "popularity": 8.732, "poster_path": "/ikDr9Ua8dglQczEDqzNvnOVyIBL.jpg", "first_air_date": "2006-09-01", "name": "Moonzy", "vote_average": 4.5, "vote_count": 13 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/pnHSFYcfp25gRaPILbAiXj3X3Dv.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 18, 35 ], "id": 108478, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "さよなら私のクラマー", "overview": "With no soccer accomplishments to speak of during the entirety of Suou Sumire's junior high school years, the young wing gets an odd offer. Suou's main rival, Soshizaki Midori, invites her to join up on the same team in high school, with a promise that she'll never let Suou \"play alone.\" It's an earnest offer, but the question is whether Suou will take her up on it. Thus the curtain opens on a story that collects an enormous cast of individual soccer-playing personalities!", "popularity": 9.7399, "poster_path": "/iunaQYinM0b7gyfUuqLzhLyMWXb.jpg", "first_air_date": "2021-04-04", "name": "Farewell, My Dear Cramer", "vote_average": 3.9, "vote_count": 8 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/1KsdGhjvY85ua79av0Pj0JPiNPp.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 254174, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "かくして！ マキナさん!!", "overview": "Eita, a mechanical otaku, discovers that Makina, the school idol he's secretly liked, is actually a robot built for sexual purposes. Now, he must navigate her bold advances while helping her keep her identity hidden in this chaotic romantic comedy.", "popularity": 8.4263, "poster_path": "/viiiAmBVRtTYdOtP4nXlQ3b0xPf.jpg", "first_air_date": "2025-04-07", "name": "Kakushite! Makina-san!!", "vote_average": 4.9, "vote_count": 12 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/uOWHuasTpabR3zenQ3Arw2N4o0a.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35, 10765 ], "id": 119631, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "RPG不動産", "overview": "The story begins 15 years after the demon king was defeated and the world has become peaceful. Kotone, who graduated from school and became a magician, inquired the kingdom-affiliated RPG Real Estate in order to find a new home. In reality, RPG Real Estate was Kotone's place of employment, and together with Fa, a demi-human, the priest Rufuria, and the soldier Rakira, they help support the searches of new homes for the customers with various circumstances.", "popularity": 8.373, "poster_path": "/yThvCUigJRtguDcysLS9QIehPyX.jpg", "first_air_date": "2022-04-06", "name": "RPG Real Estate", "vote_average": 4.7, "vote_count": 16 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/qaDvdxDkED127VPqlVxlDv29H8x.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 10759, 18, 35 ], "id": 23451, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "剣勇伝説ＹＡＩＢＡ", "overview": "Kurogane Yaiba is a boy who doesn't want to become what any regular kid would: A samurai. That's why he undergoes a hard training with his father, knowing only the forest as his world. Then, one day, he is sent to Japan, where he has to deal with a whole new civilized reality, meeting the Mine family, the evil Onimaru and even the legendary Musashi, having lots of dangerous adventures, becoming stronger everyday.", "popularity": 6.2282, "poster_path": "/fCLKqBwbqX2MOyV1FIFlWOyuuf9.jpg", "first_air_date": "1993-04-09", "name": "Legendary Brave Swordsman Yaiba", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 12 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/9AIgvFOxJ7YWmks2WsumUc8mHsE.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 68928, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "レモンエンジェル", "overview": "An idol trio are thrown into various bizarre situations.", "popularity": 7.8399, "poster_path": "/t0PKnYdEL7PFGYxIs33frCqUOrg.jpg", "first_air_date": "1987-10-02", "name": "Lemon Angel", "vote_average": 4.4, "vote_count": 5 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/ymqRWwxW0GZP0sD6NLrTgJbygM9.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 34080, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "みどりのマキバオー", "overview": "Midori no Makibaō is a manga series written and illustrated by Tsunomaru and serialized in Weekly Shōnen Jump. It was also adapted into an anime series.", "popularity": 7.8051, "poster_path": "/zXlC1NyX7Dc8PMYTdMRyhVZcjFh.jpg", "first_air_date": "1996-03-09", "name": "Midori no Makibaō", "vote_average": 4, "vote_count": 1 } ], "total_pages": 18, "total_results": 348 }
